His wife will be of a dogged type; but he will live happily up to 80 years.
CHART60
Saturn and Venus are combined with the Sun and Mars. As Mars is
inimical to Saturn and Venus, the native will not see his father for a long time
and will have no brothers. The combination ofthe Sun and Venus denies him
sisters also. There is also Rahu behind Jupiter and hence, he will be the only
son of his parents.
The disciple questions if on account of the Moon being aspected by
